description:
Freeware to detect broken (website) links

AM-DeadLink is a free tool for checking websites, browser bookmarks and other sources for broken
links.

If you have your own website, you can use AM-DeadLink to check all your pages for broken links,
missing files or redirections. AM-DeadLink checks hyperlinks, images, CSS files, Javascript files,
frames, etc.

AM-DeadLink can check the following sources for broken links:

- Website (including links, images, CSS files, ...)
- Text files
- Tab delimited files
- CSV files
- HTML files
- Google Chrome bookmarks
- Microsoft Edge bookmarks
- Firefox bookmarks
- Brave bookmarks
- Vivaldi bookmarks
Changes in version 7.2
- Brave Origin supported
- Improved support for Cloudflare-protected pages
- Smaller improvements and fixes
